mapper.sql: id, student_id, friend_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_friend (student_id, friend_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{friendId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT f.id AS rel_id, f.friend_id AS friend_id, s.name AS name, s.nick_name AS nick_name, s.avatar_url AS avatar_url, s.student_no AS student_no, s.school AS school, s.last_login_time AS last_login_time, f.create_time AS rel_create_time FROM edu_friend f LEFT JOIN edu_student s ON s.id = f.friend_id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE f.student_id = #{ownerId} AND f.deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_friend SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND ((student_id = #{a} AND friend_id = #{b}) OR (student_id = #{b} AND friend_id = #{a}))
